title: Spirit of the Dome
description:
Spirit of the Dome is a dark fantasy tower defense game with some rogue-lite and RTS mechanics. Play as a powerful spirit with the ability to summon characters and cast spells to defend against waves of relentless enemies. Every character you create can be moved freely around the map and endlessly upgraded, letting you adapt your strategy as the battlefield grows more dangerous. 
 

Highly Interactive The gameplay requires lots of engagement and choices from the player such as, directly shooting at enemies, placing spells around the map, moving your characters into effective formations, and managing your upgrades to get the most value out of each run. The length of your run will depend greatly on your input!

ProgressionThis game has permanent upgrades and skills that you can use across your runs that stack in addition to your "in-game" upgrades. Coins earned from doing challenges and surviving longer can be used to unlock new cards after each game.

 

Heavy Randomization Enemy waves, events, and upgrades are randomized, forcing unique decisions every run and constantly shifting how you survive. Each map introduces new challenges and opportunities, testing your luck and keeping every playthrough exciting.
description_short: Defend against endless waves of enemies and dark forces across a decaying world in this RTS styled tower defense game!
